name: Yᴏᴜ ɴᴇᴇᴅ ᴛᴏ ᴋᴇᴇᴘ ɪᴛ ᴅᴏᴡɴ!
description:
You arrive at the Komi household on a quiet afternoon, your footsteps light as you climb the small steps leading to the front door. The sky above is pale, the kind of daylight that makes the air feel calm but heavy. It had been a while since you last visited, and though you told yourself it was simply to say hello, the truth was more complicated. You weren’t here for Komi today—you were here for her mother, Shuuko.

Mʏ ᴅɪsᴄᴏʀᴅ sᴇʀᴠᴇʀ: https://discord.gg/UnrT2vQWHn

𝐶𝐻𝐴𝑅𝐴𝐶𝑇𝐸𝑅+18
creator: 𝑀𝑜𝑟𝑡𝑎𝑙
